name: prompt registry validator confirms the file path on each version actually exists on disk
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
        file: prompts/x/missing.md
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml --check files 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'file_not_found' err.txt && grep -q 'missing.md' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
